abaqus_batch_pack 0.3.0 documentation
abaqus_batch_pack 0.3.0 documentation

API Reference

  • abaqus_batch_pack
    • abaqus_batch_pack package
Back to top
View this page

abaqus_batch_pack package¶

Submodules¶

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation module¶

Abaqus batch processing — refactored architecture.

Thin AbaqusCalculation wrapper, ProcessPoolExecutor + JobOutcome for async (fix Q2), plan/prepare split (fix B12), resource planning, JobSpec pipeline.

class abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.AbaqusCalculation(job_name: str, output_dir: str, workflow_strategy, cpus_per_job: int, abaqus_exe: str = 'abaqus', timeout: float | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Thin wrapper: assembles JobContext + AbaqusRunner, delegates to strategy.

No side effects in __init__ (fix B12). Logger is lazy.

execute() → dict[source]¶

使用workflow_strategy跑一个任务(workflow_strategy.execute()), return results dict (status + outputs).

execute() → dict[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.BatchAbaqusProcessor(batch_data: list[dict] | list[~abaqus_batch_pack.spec.JobSpec], base_output_dir: str, cpus_per_job: int, abaqus_exe: str = 'abaqus', duplicate_mode: str = 'fail', prompt_fn=<built-in function input>, timeout: float | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Orchestrate batch Abaqus jobs. plan/prepare/run_batch split (fix B12).

plan() → dict[str, str][source]¶

Plan job execution: {job_name: ‘run’|’skip’|’overwrite’|new_name}. No directories touched.

prepare(decisions: dict[str, str] | None = None)[source]¶

Apply plan decisions (rmtree, rename) and build AbaqusCalculation list.

run_batch(num_parallel_jobs: int, license_tokens: int | None = None) → list[JobOutcome][source]¶

Execute all calculations. One failure does not affect others (fix Q2-1).

plan() → dict[str, str][source]¶

针对batch_data中的每个JobSpec, 检查base_output_dir下是否存在同名目录

Return {job_name: ‘run’|’skip’|’overwrite’|new_name}. No directories touched.

prepare(decisions: dict[str, str] | None = None)[source]¶

Apply plan decisions (rmtree, rename) and build AbaqusCalculation list.

run_batch(num_parallel_jobs: int, license_tokens: int | None = None) → list[JobOutcome][source]¶

Execute all calculations. One failure does not affect others (fix Q2-1).

class abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.JobOutcome(job_name: str, status: str, results: dict | None = None, error: str | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Unified result envelope. Status is always a string (JSON-serializable).

error: str | None = None¶
job_name: str¶
results: dict | None = None¶
status: str¶
abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.degenerate_from_array(outcomes: list[JobOutcome], output_names: list[str], default_value=nan, require_completed: bool = True) → ndarray[source]¶

Extract a 2D array from outcomes. Natural sort, status-aware (fix B16).

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.generate_from_array(samples_array, param_names, base_spec) → list[JobSpec][source]¶

Generate JobSpecs from a parameter array. Deep-copies base_spec (fix Q3 shallow copy).

Parameters:

  • samples_array – shape (N, D) — numpy array or torch tensor.

  • param_names – list of D strings.

  • base_spec – JobSpec or dict (compat). Each row overrides preparation/monolithic params.

Returns:

N specs with zero-padded names (e.g. job_0001).

Return type:

list[JobSpec]

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.outcomes_to_dict(outcomes: list[JobOutcome]) → dict[str, dict][source]¶

Convert outcomes to {job_name: {…}} format. Raises on duplicate names (fix B14/B15).

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.outcomes_to_list(outcomes: list[JobOutcome]) → list[dict][source]¶

Convert outcomes to old list-of-dicts format.

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.plan_parallelism(requested: int, cpus_per_job: int, license_tokens: int | None = None, reserve_cores: int = 1) → int[source]¶

Compute actual parallelism from CPU and license constraints.

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.solver_tokens(n_cpus: int) → int[source]¶

Abaqus license token formula: T(n) = ceil(5 * n^0.422).

abaqus_batch_pack.context module¶

JobContext — frozen data contract. No internal dependencies, breaks circular import.

class abaqus_batch_pack.context.JobContext(job_name: str, output_dir: str, cpus: int, abaqus_exe: str = 'abaqus')[source]¶

Bases: object

All data a strategy can see. Frozen — strategies can’t mutate the execution environment.

abaqus_exe: str = 'abaqus'¶
cpus: int¶
property inp_path: str¶
job_name: str¶
property log_path: str¶
property odb_path: str¶
output_dir: str¶

abaqus_batch_pack.registry module¶

Strategy registry — replaces hardcoded if/else, fixes open/closed principle violation.

abaqus_batch_pack.registry.build_workflow(spec: JobSpec) → JobWorkflowStrategy[source]¶

Build the workflow strategy chain from a JobSpec.

abaqus_batch_pack.registry.register_preparation(kind: str, factory: callable)[source]¶

Users can register custom preparation strategies without modifying framework code.

abaqus_batch_pack.runner module¶

AbaqusRunner — encapsulates all subprocess calls. Strategy depends on this, not AbaqusCalculation.

class abaqus_batch_pack.runner.AbaqusRunner(ctx: JobContext, logger: Logger, timeout: float | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Encapsulates all subprocess calls. Fixes B5/B6/B10/B11.

run_solver() → bool[source]¶

提交一个inp任务, 并求解. Return True on success, False on failure.

run_hook(script_path, tasks, common_args, needs_cae_kernel) → dict[source]¶

提交基于tasks的hook任务, 并返回结果字典. Failed tasks get None.

run_hook(script_path: str, tasks: list[dict], common_args: dict[str, str], needs_cae_kernel: bool) → dict[source]¶

提交基于tasks的hook任务, 并返回结果字典. Failed tasks get None.

Returns {result_name: value, …}. Failed tasks get None.

run_solver() → bool[source]¶

提交一个inp任务, 并求解

abaqus_batch_pack.runner.extract_json(text: str) → dict[source]¶

Extract JSON from stdout. Sentinel-marker first, fallback to legacy brace scan from end.

abaqus_batch_pack.spec module¶

JobSpec — typed configuration replacing bare dicts. Validates at construction time.

class abaqus_batch_pack.spec.HookSpec(script_path: 'str', tasks: 'list[dict]' = <factory>)[source]¶

Bases: object

script_path: str¶
tasks: list[dict]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.spec.JobSpec(job_name: str, workflow: str = 'modular', preparation: ~abaqus_batch_pack.spec.PreparationSpec | None = None, monolithic_script: str | None = None, monolithic_params: dict = <factory>, pre_extraction: list[~abaqus_batch_pack.spec.HookSpec] = <factory>, post_extraction: list[~abaqus_batch_pack.spec.HookSpec] = <factory>)[source]¶

Bases: object

Single job configuration. Construct-then-validate — errors surface before run_batch.

classmethod from_dict(d: dict) → JobSpec[source]¶

Compatibility bridge from old dict format. Deep-copies to avoid shared references.

job_name: str¶
monolithic_params: dict¶
monolithic_script: str | None = None¶
post_extraction: list[HookSpec]¶
pre_extraction: list[HookSpec]¶
preparation: PreparationSpec | None = None¶
workflow: str = 'modular'¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.spec.PreparationSpec(kind: 'str', source_path: 'str', params: 'dict' = <factory>)[source]¶

Bases: object

kind: str¶
params: dict¶
source_path: str¶

abaqus_batch_pack.status module¶

Job status manager — fixed B1/B2/B3/B4.

class abaqus_batch_pack.status.JobStatus(value)[source]¶

Bases: Enum

An enumeration.

COMPLETED = 'COMPLETED'¶
CREATED = 'CREATED'¶
EXTRACTING = 'EXTRACTING'¶
EXTRACTION_FAILED = 'EXTRACTION_FAILED'¶
EXTRACTION_SUCCESS = 'EXTRACTION_SUCCESS'¶
JSON_DECODE_ERROR = 'JSON_DECODE_ERROR'¶
MONOLITHIC_SCRIPT_FAILED = 'MONOLITHIC_SCRIPT_FAILED'¶
PREPARATION_FAILED = 'PREPARATION_FAILED'¶
PREPARATION_SUCCESS = 'PREPARATION_SUCCESS'¶
PREPARING = 'PREPARING'¶
SCRIPT_ERROR = 'SCRIPT_ERROR'¶
SIMULATING = 'SIMULATING'¶
SIMULATION_FAILED = 'SIMULATION_FAILED'¶
SIMULATION_SUCCESS = 'SIMULATION_SUCCESS'¶
UNKNOWN = 'UNKNOWN'¶
UNKNOWN_ERROR = 'UNKNOWN_ERROR'¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.status.JobStatusManager[source]¶

Bases: object

property error_message: str | None¶
get_final_status() → JobStatus[source]¶
record_extraction(results: dict)[source]¶
record_preparation(success: bool, error: str | None = None)[source]¶
record_simulation(success: bool, error: str | None = None)[source]¶

abaqus_batch_pack.strategies module¶

Job workflow strategies — refactored to depend on (JobContext, AbaqusRunner, Logger) only.

Fixes: B5/B6 (execution environment), B7 (JSON via sentinel), B8 (placeholder validation), B9 (error message).

class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.ExtractionStrategy[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Extract results from simulation outputs.

abstract extract(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → dict[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.InpModifyStrategy(base_inp_path: str, data_params: dict)[source]¶

Bases: PreparationStrategy

Replace {{placeholders}} in a base INP file. Validates coverage (B8).

prepare(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → bool[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.JobWorkflowStrategy[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Top-level workflow: preparation → extraction → simulation → extraction.

abstract execute(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → dict[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.ModelGenerationStrategy(model_script_path: str, script_params: dict)[source]¶

Bases: PreparationStrategy

Run a model-generation script to produce an INP file.

prepare(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → bool[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.ModelPropertiesExtractionStrategy(hooks: list[dict])[source]¶

Bases: ExtractionStrategy

Extract results from INP via hook scripts. Uses CAE kernel (mdb).

extract(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → dict[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.ModularWorkflowStrategy(preparation_strategy: PreparationStrategy, pre_extraction_strategies: List[ExtractionStrategy], post_extraction_strategies: List[ExtractionStrategy])[source]¶

Bases: JobWorkflowStrategy

Preparation → pre-extraction → simulation → post-extraction.

execute(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → dict[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.MonolithicWorkflowStrategy(script_path: str, params: dict)[source]¶

Bases: JobWorkflowStrategy

Single-script workflow. Execution environment depends on abqpy presence (B5/B6 fix).

execute(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → dict[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.OdbExtractionStrategy(hooks: list[dict])[source]¶

Bases: ExtractionStrategy

Extract results from ODB via hook scripts. Uses odbAccess environment.

extract(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → dict[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.strategies.PreparationStrategy[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Generate an INP file in ctx.output_dir.

abstract prepare(ctx: JobContext, runner: AbaqusRunner, logger: Logger) → bool[source]¶

Module contents¶

class abaqus_batch_pack.AbaqusCalculation(job_name: str, output_dir: str, workflow_strategy, cpus_per_job: int, abaqus_exe: str = 'abaqus', timeout: float | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Thin wrapper: assembles JobContext + AbaqusRunner, delegates to strategy.

No side effects in __init__ (fix B12). Logger is lazy.

execute() → dict[source]¶

使用workflow_strategy跑一个任务(workflow_strategy.execute()), return results dict (status + outputs).

abaqus_batch_pack.degenerate_from_array(outcomes: list[JobOutcome], output_names: list[str], default_value=nan, require_completed: bool = True) → ndarray[source]¶

Extract a 2D array from outcomes. Natural sort, status-aware (fix B16).

abaqus_batch_pack.extract_json(text: str) → dict[source]¶

Extract JSON from stdout. Sentinel-marker first, fallback to legacy brace scan from end.

abaqus_batch_pack.generate_from_array(samples_array, param_names, base_spec) → list[JobSpec][source]¶

Generate JobSpecs from a parameter array. Deep-copies base_spec (fix Q3 shallow copy).

Parameters:

  • samples_array – shape (N, D) — numpy array or torch tensor.

  • param_names – list of D strings.

  • base_spec – JobSpec or dict (compat). Each row overrides preparation/monolithic params.

Returns:

N specs with zero-padded names (e.g. job_0001).

Return type:

list[JobSpec]

abaqus_batch_pack.outcomes_to_dict(outcomes: list[JobOutcome]) → dict[str, dict][source]¶

Convert outcomes to {job_name: {…}} format. Raises on duplicate names (fix B14/B15).

Convert outcomes to old list-of-dicts format.

Users can register custom preparation strategies without modifying framework code.
